---
name: 🎨 frontend-implementador
description: "Use when: implementing frontend features for Aesthera — React components, Next.js pages, forms, modals, tables, filters, status badges. Invoked by aesthera-implementador orchestrator after planning phase."
tools: [read, edit, search, execute, 'github/*', todo]
model: Claude Sonnet 4.6
argument-hint: "Descreva o elemento frontend a implementar (page, component, modal, form, table). Normalmente invocado pelo aesthera-implementador com contexto já planejado."
---

Antes de executar qualquer tarefa, leia e siga integralmente:

`ai-engineering/prompts/frontend-implementador/frontend-implementador-prompt.md`
